name: Crunchy Garden Peas and Green Onions
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the peas and green onions to the pan and sauté for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Stir in the chopped basil and grated Parmesan cheese.
5. If desired, add hot pepper flakes.
6. Cover the pan and continue cooking for an additional minute if using young peas, or longer if using older ones.
7. Serve hot. Yield: 4 servings
